item.title: robpizzola: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 2min I've been asked enough times that I'll share my NHL Playoff fair series prices. Full tran
item.description:
Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 2min I've been asked enough times that I'll share my NHL Playoff fair series prices. Full transparency these may not be good enough to beat market at this time, but I have been using them to actively add to positions today.
PIT -117 / PHI -117 BUF -209 / BOS +209 CAR -126 / OTT +126 Mostrar más 1 4 362

item.title: MikeGarafolo: Around The NFL reposteó Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 5min En respuesta a @MikeGarafolo Hollawayne is a late-round/free
item.description: Around The NFL reposteó Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 5min En respuesta a @MikeGarafolo Hollawayne is a late-round/free agent prospect who will have to work his way onto a roster. Getting ahead of things a bit by learning what it’s like to work with and alongside NFL talent and what a Super Bowl MVP QB expects. 1 4 6 4 mil

item.title: MikeGarafolo: Around The NFL reposteó Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 7min Temple WR Kajiya Hollawayne had some NFL-caliber tutelage lea
item.description: Around The NFL reposteó Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 7min Temple WR Kajiya Hollawayne had some NFL-caliber tutelage leading up to the Draft via regular throwing sessions with #Eagles QB Jalen Hurts and WR DeVonta Smith this month. Got a message from the football office one day to show up ready to work. And he was. Good experience. 6 7 37 7 mil

item.description: Around The NFL reposteó Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 35min From last night’s episode of The Insiders on @nflnetwork on Miami OT Francis Mauigoa’s back, with teams in the top 10 of next week’s Draft getting the all clear from their own medical evaluators. 4 21 56 21 mil
